High-Fidelity Control of Superconducting Qubits Using Direct Microwave Synthesis in Higher Nyquist Zones

Quantum Engineering and Computing Group, Raytheon BBN Technologies, Cambridge, MA 02138 USA

ABSTRACT
Control electronics for superconducting quantum processors have strict requirements for accurate command of the sensitive quantum states of their qubits.

This file is intentionally a short semantic reference, not a full-text transcription.
